name: ui-kit-monorepo
description: Meta root for @cjlapao/ui-kit (react/), @cjlapao/ui-kit-vue (vue/) and the shared framework-agnostic source (common/).

scripts.build: npm run build:react && npm run build:vue
scripts.lint: npm run lint:react && npm run lint:vue
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix react install && npm --prefix vue install && npm --prefix react/demo install && npm --prefix vue/demo install
